meaning: adj.笨拙的,粗鲁的,偏转的,无礼的
examples: We're all a bit gauche when we're young.
The fold in the chain is completed using only 3 or 4 monomer units with bonds in the gauche conformation.
We can not afford to be gauche.
In part this is just the desire of a slightly gauche place to appear hip.
There is, perhaps, something a little gauche in his confessional volubility.
